sentence: 热带地区全年气温都很高。
pinyin: Rèdài dìqū quán nián qìwēn dōu hěn gāo.
english: Temperatures in tropical regions are high all year round.

sentence: 很多网民对这件事发表了看法。
pinyin: Hěn duō wǎng mín duì zhè jiàn shì fā biǎo le kàn fǎ.
english: Many Internet users shared their opinions on the matter.

sentence: 父母慢慢老去，我们应该多陪陪他们。
pinyin: Fù mǔ màn màn lǎo qù, wǒ men yīng gāi duō péi péi tā men.
english: As our parents slowly get older, we should spend more time with them.

sentence: 他叔叔在陆军服役了十年。
pinyin: Tā shūshu zài lùjūn fúyì le shí nián.
english: His uncle served in the army for ten years.

sentence: 买新手机还是修旧手机？前者更划算。
pinyin: Mǎi xīn shǒujī háishi xiū jiù shǒujī? Qiánzhě gèng huásuàn.
english: Buy a new phone or repair the old one? The former is more cost-effective.
